ui.seoDescription: VoiceCraft Client/Server setup and configuration for Minecraft Bedrock.

download.title: Download VoiceCraft
download.subtitle: Choose the latest client or server build for your platform. Client downloads are automatically highlighted for your current OS when detection is available.
download.detected: A recommended client build has been highlighted for your device.
download.clientSubtitle: Desktop and mobile client builds for players. Android 32-bit is no longer published.
download.serverSubtitle: Standalone server builds for self-hosting and deployment.
download.androidNote: Android 32-bit is no longer available. Use the arm64 Android build.
download.serverSourceNote: If you need a platform that is not listed here, check the full releases page or build from source.
download.addonSubtitle: Bedrock addon package and source links.
download.addonNote: Use releases for packaged builds. Source ZIP is useful for custom modifications.

telemetry.title: VoiceCraft Usage Dashboard
telemetry.subtitle: Live aggregates from the public telemetry API: installs, operating systems, runtimes, release channels, server capacity, and selected telemetry metric values.
telemetry.loadingSubtitle: The dashboard is pulling current aggregates from vc-api.avion.team.
telemetry.emptyTitle: Telemetry is online, but there is no usage data yet
telemetry.emptySubtitle: As soon as VoiceCraft clients or servers start reporting events, the charts here will populate automatically.
telemetry.noChartData: No data for this chart yet.
telemetry.partialData: Some secondary charts could not be loaded, so the dashboard is showing the data that was available.

charts.osShareSubtitle: Where VoiceCraft is running right now.
charts.uniqueOsShareSubtitle: Latest known OS split by unique fingerprint.
charts.channelShareSubtitle: How usage is split across stable and other channels.
charts.roleShareSubtitle: Observed roles in the telemetry stream.
charts.versionShareSubtitle: Most active app versions in the current snapshot.
charts.osVersionShareSubtitle: Reported operating system versions from clients.
charts.osBuildShareSubtitle: Build identifiers reported by client devices.
charts.osDescriptionShareSubtitle: Full operating system descriptions reported by clients.
charts.processArchitectureShareSubtitle: Process architecture that the app is currently running under.
charts.runtimeShareSubtitle: Runtime versions reported by the current telemetry payloads.
charts.localeShareSubtitle: Most common user locales reported by clients.
charts.vendorShareSubtitle: Hardware vendors seen in anonymous reports.
charts.serverPlatformShareSubtitle: Host platforms reported by server telemetry.
charts.serverConnectedClientsSubtitle: How many clients servers report as connected right now.
charts.serverMaxClientsSubtitle: Configured capacity buckets reported by servers.
charts.tagShareSubtitle: Common event tags flowing through the ingest API.
charts.dumpCategoryShareSubtitle: Crash, log, and diagnostic dump distribution.

landing.title: VoiceCraft Documentation
landing.subtitle: Cross-platform proximity voice chat for Minecraft Bedrock Edition. Installation, configuration, operations, and McHttp/McWss integration in a single documentation hub.

slides.title: Client Home Screen
slides.description: Server overview, quick connect flow, and current session status in one place.

slides.title: Settings and Network
slides.description: Positioning parameters, McWss endpoint, and advanced client behavior tuning.

slides.title: Audio Pipeline
slides.description: Input/output devices, sensitivity, denoising, AGC, and microphone tests.
